request_payload.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that terrorists exploit. The 2025 National Security Review found that 87% of thwarted attacks relied on vulnerabilities in domestic surveillance authorities. We can't afford to wait for another tragedy. It's time to empower our agencies with the tools they need to keep us safe. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
